---
title: "Ideation with AI Agents"
subtitle: "Day 2 - Block 1"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B1"
    bibliography:
      - ../../../resources/workshop-citations.bib
      - ../../assets/references.bib
    embed-resources: true
---

## R&D ➡️ Academia [^s1]

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-align: center
flowchart LR
  A[Domain Exploration] --> B[Domain Selection]
  B --> C[Domain Immersion]
  C --> D[Research Question Selection]
  D --> E[Idea Napkin]
```

## Projects in ChatGPT / Claude

We can define "projects" (folders) in ChatGPT / Claude

The resources and chats in here reference each other

> A "canvas" to ideate (also with collaborators!)

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/project_setup.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="true"}

## Domain exploration

- What skills do you and your collaborators have?
- What is the state of the world?
- ...

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/add_cv_resource.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="true"}

## Domain exploration

> In light of your contstraints, what domains should we explore?

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/domain_exploration.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="true"}

## Domain selection

For example, by scoring ideation domains [@stremersch2024how]:

| Domain                | Interest | Feasibility | Timeliness | 
| --------------------- | -------- | ----------- | ---------- | 
| GenAI as Market Actor | 5        | 5           | 5          | 
| AI Business Models    | 4        | 4           | 5          | 
| Sustainability        | 3        | 4           | 4          | 

> Caveat: AI scoring is not solved yet

## Domain immersion

After selecting a domain, we need to create more context for it:

- Deep research (e.g. with agents)
- Pulling in resources (e.g. papers, datasets, news, ...)

More sophisticated things are possible (e.g. RAG, ...)

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/domain_immersion.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="true"}


## Ideation in this domain {.smaller}

| Dimension |                                         |             AI             |
| :----------------: | --------------------------------------- | :------------------------: |
|       Source       | Isolate → Immerse                       |       Deep Research        |
|       Scope        | Few & narrow → Many & wide              |     @meincke2024using      |
|       Share        | Late → Early                            |      Sparring with AI      |
|       Select       | Unstructured & slow → Structured & fast | Canvas & Prototyping |
: Adapted from @stremersch2024how

## ⚠️ IP and HARKING [^s8]

- IP is messy: Shield is Human-AI collaboration!
- Researcher obligation [@blanchardNewToolsNew2025]
- What does it mean to do preliminary analysis with AI? (e.g. for HARKING)

> Hybrid is the key!

[^s1]: Sources: @stremersch2024how
[^s0]: Sources: @stremersch2024how
[^s1a]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @lewis2020rag
[^s1b]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @meincke2024using
[^s1c]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @arora2025ai
[^s1d]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @willisonAgenticPatterns
[^s2]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @willisonAgenticPatterns
[^s3]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @lewis2020rag
[^s4]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @arora2025ai
[^s5]: Sources: @girotra2023ideas
[^s6]: Sources: @brandUsingGPTMarket2023b; @liFrontiersDeterminingValidity2024
[^s7]: Sources: @arora2025ai; @willisonAgenticPatterns
[^s8]: Sources: @stremersch2024how; @blanchardNewToolsNew2025; @linSixFallaciesSubstituting2025; @arora2025ai

## References

::: {#refs}

:::
